meta.title: Pushkin Son — boutique apartments in Saint Petersburg
meta.description: Quiet premium stays in four central locations. Request-to-book flow.

Home.heroSubtitle: Apartments in the heart of St. Petersburg
Home.objectsMapAlt: Map of four Pushkin Son locations in central Saint Petersburg
Home.heroLead: <bold>4</bold> locations, <bold>19</bold> spaces for travel or business.
Home.aboutLead: For over 10 years we have welcomed guests to the heart of Saint Petersburg — where museums, theatres, and historic streets are right outside your door.
Home.aboutBody: Pushkin Son is nineteen apartments across four buildings: from a cozy studio for two to a spacious three-room flat for a larger group. Each space is set up for a comfortable stay — fresh interiors, quiet courtyards, easy check-in, and the city’s main sights within easy walking distance.
Home.aboutHighlight1: Guests often rate our location 10 out of 10 — you stay in the city center
Home.aboutHighlight2: Standard and Comfort studios, one- and two-room flats — for couples, families, or groups
Home.aboutHighlight3: Four addresses: Pestelya, Nevsky Avenue, Vasilyevsky Island, and Nekrasova Street
Home.bookingSectionLead: Choose an apartment and pick your dates in the calendar — we will confirm availability.
Home.ctaBody: Booking is a request: we confirm availability and details by phone or email.
Home.bookingNote: Online payments come later — the database is already prepared.
Home.searchSelectDates: Please select check-in and check-out dates
Home.searchResultsCount: {count, plural, one {# option found} other {# options found}}
Home.searchResultsEmpty: No apartments available for these dates
Home.searchResultsEmptyHint: Try different dates, fewer guests, or another location.
Home.searchForNights: for {nights, plural, one {# night} other {# nights}}

personalData.title: Your data is protected
personalData.protected: Name, phone, and email are stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM) in line with Russian personal data law.
personalData.noAi: Personal data is never sent to AI systems.
personalData.mergeOnly: For briefs or commercial proposals, contact details are inserted on our server only — after the text is generated.
personalData.consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data to handle this booking request and contact me.

Property.calSyncNote: Avito calendar sync is not enabled yet. The property model already reserves fields for an iCal URL and last import time—we will wire this up when you are ready.

calendar.selectCheckIn: Select check-in date on the calendar

Addresses.title: Locations
Addresses.subtitle: All homes are grouped by address

Contacts.title: Contact
Contacts.body: For bookings and partnerships — email or messenger (add your contacts here).

Legal.privacyAiBody: We do not send your name, phone, or email to external language models. Document generation runs without personal data in the AI request; contact details are merged locally afterwards.
Legal.termsBody: By using the site you agree to data processing and booking rules. Replace this draft with a lawyer-reviewed offer before accepting online payments.
Legal.rulesBody: We want your stay to feel easy and comfortable for everyone. Check-in times, quiet hours, deposits, and pets are described for each apartment and on this page.

Naming.hint: Internal codes (e.g. NKR-01) help staff; guests see a descriptive title and group address.
